items.headline: BofA Securities Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $155 From $225, Maintains Buy Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: RBC Cuts Price Target on Albemarle to $166 From $257, Keeps Outperform Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: The No.1 Commodity Story of the Year Is Flying Under Wall Street's Radar
items.snippet: Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) holds one of the few established positions in downstream cesium chemicals, giving Power Metals an established commercial destination for its concentrate.

items.headline: Will ALB's Expansion Actions Power Stronger Sales Volumes?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation ALB is strategically executing its projects aimed at boosting its global lithium conversion capacity. The market for lithium batteries and energy storage remains strong.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Loses 25.1% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
items.snippet: ALB currently has a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), which means it is in the top 20% of more than 4,000 stocks that we rank based on trends in earnings estimate revisions and EPS surprises.

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately amid slowing EV demand in China, an inventory glut and prospects of increased supply.
